nasb.text: It shall be eaten the same day you offer it, and the next day; but what remains until the third day shall be burned with fire.

esv.text: It shall be eaten the same day you offer it or on the day after, and anything left over until the third day shall be burned up with fire.

cnv.text: 祭牲的肉，要在你們獻的那一天和第二天吃；如果有剩下的，到了第三天，就要用火燒掉。

ccb.text: 要在献祭当天或第二天吃完祭物。如果第三天还有剩余，都要烧掉。
